user.title: AWTRIX Device
user.description: Enter the IP address of your Ulanzi TC001 / AWTRIX 3 device.

entities.title: Home Connect Entities
entities.description: Select the entities provided by the Home Connect integration for your dishwasher. Only the operation state is required. The door entity is needed for automatic acknowledgement (opening the door dismisses the 'finished' notification).

data.drying_timer: Drying Timer after Programme End (minutes, 0 = disabled)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the AWTRIX device. Check the IP address and ensure the device is online.
error.timeout: Connection timed out. Check your network.
error.invalid_host: A valid IP address or hostname is required.
error.missing_entity: Please select an operation state entity.

abort.already_configured: This AWTRIX device is already configured.

data.drying_timer: Drying Timer after Programme End (minutes, 0 = disabled)

error.missing_entity: Please select an operation state entity.
